case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. REBECCA PICKENS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE : VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PICKENS, REBECCA
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-20-2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-02-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-20-2014 - CASE SETTLED PER FAXED LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DATED 10/17/14 WITH A COPY OF THE NOTICE OF CONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON MAR-17-2015 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. (206)
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-17-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PICKENS, REBECCA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-14-2014
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 14362077)
DECLARATION RE; REDUCED FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SERVED DEC-30-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PICKENS, REBECCA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-02-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
